esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
// Datacenter-level host, VM, and cluster counts by entity status
// Yellow or red status indicates problems; gray may indicate disconnected
// Combine host, VM, and cluster counts with unhealthy status
| WHERE (vcenter.datacenter.host.count IS NOT NULL OR vcenter.datacenter.vm.count IS NOT NULL OR vcenter.datacenter.cluster.count IS NOT NULL)
  AND attributes.status IN ("yellow", "red")
| EVAL entity_type = CASE(vcenter.datacenter.host.count IS NOT NULL, "host", vcenter.datacenter.vm.count IS NOT NULL, "vm", "cluster")
| EVAL unhealthy_count = COALESCE(vcenter.datacenter.host.count, vcenter.datacenter.vm.count, vcenter.datacenter.cluster.count)
| WHERE unhealthy_count > 0
| STATS total_unhealthy = SUM(unhealthy_count) BY vcenter.datacenter.name, attributes.status, entity_type
| SORT total_unhealthy DESC
| LIMIT 20
